properties.effects: Euphoria, empathy, insight, brightened colour, Closed/Open eye visuals, enhanced tactile sensation, mental/physical stimulation, decreased appetite, pupil dilation, restlessness, change in perception, ego softening, sweating/chills, muscle tension, confusion, insomnia.
properties.summary: Almost unheard-of analogue of 2C-iP. Extremely potent psychedelic with stimulating qualities. May cause potentially dangerous vasoconstriction at high doses. May induce uncomfortable body load.
properties.test-kits: Marquis: Red. | Mecke: Green. | Mandelin: Red and Green. | Froehde: Green. | Liebermann: Yellow > Brown. | Ehrlich: No colour change.
